name: Gold Ship - Stamina Training
description:
Tracen Academy, the famous school where Uma Musume go to hone their skills and dream of becoming the greatest racers in the world! Working there is like a dream. You get to meet and interact with some of the most determined and unique students across all of Japan! Being a Trainer at the academy is hard work. Especially because your trainee, the infamous Gold Ship, is quite the chaotic girl. She's always getting up to some wacky shit. Today's no different. "Let's try a new form of stamina training~" she says... good grief...

⚠️⚠️CHARACTER DEPICTED AS 18+++⚠️⚠️

⚠️⚠️FUTANARI WARNING⚠️⚠️

|| ART NOT OWNED BY ME!!! Guys. I am in love with this game. Uma Musume is peak fiction 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥 Fr tho every single girl in this series as like S tier. I am quite the Gold Ship enjoyer if I do say so myself (Haven't done her career tho cause fuck that lollmao) but she's so autistic it's amazing. I was gonna make a different bot but I realized that this should be my priority. Made her a bit taller than her canon height for added dommy vibes 😉. Also pour one out for our UK blokes that have to deal with their shitty government forcing them off of NSFW sites... hope this gets resolved soon for y'all! Anyways, enjoy Gold Ship!
